text.title: Synthetic Users Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Will this synthetic output drive a Go/No-Go, pricing, or launch decision?

branch.when: decision_class == go_nogo OR pricing OR launch

conclusion.verdict: proceed — generate panel with adversarial minimum

example.trace: input matches `decision_class == go_nogo OR pricing OR launch` → conclusion ref=`no-wtp-or-forecast`.
